EXCELLENCE IN ENGINEERING

Quality Control Without Guesswork

Our quality workflow focuses on material selection, production checks, assembly review, and clear documentation for B2B buyers.

The 8-Step Polishing Process

Mastery is a slow endeavor. We apply an exhaustive manual finishing protocol to every component, ensuring tactile perfection that lasts generations.

01. RAW MATERIAL SELECTION

Only medical-grade polycarbonate and aerospace-grade brass alloys are selected for the chassis.

02. ULTRASONIC CLEANING

Components undergo high-frequency sound wave baths to remove microscopic debris from the casting process.

03. PRIMARY MANUAL GRINDING

Artisans hand-grind the primary surfaces to define the structural silhouette and sharp architectural edges.

04. PRECISION SANDING

Progressive grit cycles refine the texture, achieving a uniform matte or mirror-like base for final finishing.

05. CHEMICAL ETCHING

A controlled electrolytic bath prepares the metal surface for superior finish adhesion and longevity.

06. THE FINISHING STROKE

Manual brushing or PVD coating creates the final aesthetic layer, from Brushed Brass to Matte Obsidian.

07. COLD SEALING

A high-tech nano-layer is applied to prevent fingerprinting and oxidation without altering the tactile feel.

08. MICROSCOPIC INSPECTION

Every piece is inspected under 20x magnification for surface uniformity and geometric precision.

Technical Benchmarks

100k+

CLICK CYCLE TESTING

Switch feel, component fit, and mechanical structure can be reviewed through sample confirmation before bulk orders.

sync
V0

FLAME RETARDANT PC

Material options and housing requirements can be discussed by product model and target market.

local_fire_department
AgNi

SILVER ALLOY CONTACTS

Contact structure and conductive components are matched by product model, cost target, and application scenario.

bolt

Documentation & Market Requirements

CE

MODEL DOCUMENTATION

Product documents can be prepared by model and confirmed requirement.

UL

MARKET REQUEST

For regulated markets, requested documentation should be confirmed before order.

NOTE

MATERIAL NOTES

Material and packaging notes can be discussed during sample confirmation.

ISO
9001:2015

QC PROCESS

Production and inspection workflow can be reviewed with trade buyers.

Experience Excellence Firsthand

We welcome our contract partners to explore our state-of-the-art facility. Schedule a virtual walk-through or an in-person tour of our Wenzhou production facility.
